name: Ash (deity)
description: Ash or Yuc (Tamazight: ⵢⵓⵛ, romanized: Yuc, IPA: [jʊʃ]) was an Amazigh sky god worshipped by the Libyan and Tehenu tribes of the Western Desert, an area of desert that lies west of the Nile River.[1][2][3] He was regarded as the "Lord of the Tehenu" by the Ancient Egyptians.[4]
